texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: i. For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 45-30 days from noon on the date of Check in - 15% of the rate applicable per room night cancelled.
texts.text: For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 45-30 days from noon on the date of Check in - 15% of the rate applicable per room night cancelled.

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 29-20 days from noon on the date of Check in - 25% of the rate applicable per room night cancelled.

texts.text: For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 19-15 days from noon on the date of Check in - 50% of the rate applicable per room night cancelled.

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: Incase of cancellation less than 14 days from noon on the date of Check in, or in case of No-show -100% of the net value of the booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: i. A 25% deposit is required 45 days prior to arrival date & full payment 7 days prior to Trave l Company's clients' a rrival. For bookings made within 30 days we require 50 % deposit & full payment 7 days prior to Travel Company's clients' arrival. Reservations / bookings not prepaid by the appropriate deposits will be released automatically and without prior notice.
texts.text: A 25% deposit is required 45 days prior to arrival date & full payment 7 days prior to Trave l Company's clients' a rrival. For bookings made within 30 days we require 50 % deposit & full payment 7 days prior to Travel Company's clients' arrival. Reservations / bookings not prepaid by the appropriate deposits will be released automatically and without prior notice.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ii. Any dispute regarding an invoice, must be received by Sawela Capella Lodge credit department within 14 days of receipt of that invoice, failure to which it is deemed that the full amount becomes payable to Sawela Capella Lodge.
texts.text: Any dispute regarding an invoice, must be received by Sawela Capella Lodge credit department within 14 days of receipt of that invoice, failure to which it is deemed that the full amount becomes payable to Sawela Capella Lodge.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: iii. In the event that payment in full is not made within the time specified, Sawela Capella Lodge may at its discretion terminate this agreement forthwith and thereafter shall have no obligation to provide hotel services to the operator/company.
texts.text: In the event that payment in full is not made within the time specified, Sawela Capella Lodge may at its discretion terminate this agreement forthwith and thereafter shall have no obligation to provide hotel services to the operator/company.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Sawela Capella Lodge will not be liable to pay compensation for changes due to unforeseen circumstances beyond our control for example fire, flood, natural disaster, industrial disputes, bad weather or terrorist activity.

texts.text: Sawela Capella Lodge may at its discretion by giving notice in writing to operators alter the specified rates:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: i. In the event of change in the value of the Kenya shilling by more than 5% by way of devaluation or currency fluctuation, at its discretion increase the specified rates proportionately by the amount of such devaluation and with effect from the date of devaluation.
texts.text: In the event of change in the value of the Kenya shilling by more than 5% by way of devaluation or currency fluctuation, at its discretion increase the specified rates proportionately by the amount of such devaluation and with effect from the date of devaluation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ii. In the event of any change of Government taxes, reserve the right to adjust these rates accordingly. While care will be taken to provide reasonable notice and also to maintain these rates, Sawela Capella Lodges reserves the right to change the rates charged without any prior notice and pass them to the Tour Operator
